name: Absolute Path Traversal
description: The product uses external input to construct a pathname but does not properly neutralize absolute path sequences, allowing attackers to specify any file on the system by providing a full absolute path that bypasses intended directory restrictions.
detection_pattern: INGRESS node provides an absolute path (starting with '/' or drive letter) that flows to STORAGE[file_access] without a CONTROL node that rejects absolute paths, strips leading separators, or enforces a chroot/jail to a restricted directory
